_comment: Curated 'where to look' map for the roles lens. Maintained by Glyphie 🌀. Mirrors how publication sources are curated — each entry says which machine-readable ATS endpoint to hit per company. ATS public JSON APIs (greenhouse/lever/ashby) are used; no LinkedIn, no HTML scraping where an API exists. Verified reachable 2026-06-24.

sources.note: Greenhouse board is a curated subset (~18 roles), not the full Google careers site. London frontier-safety roles do appear. Treat as partial.
Launch gap batch verified HTTP 200; 3 jobs at check time, no relevant policy/legal/governance role.
UK AI Safety Institute — 6 London roles at check time (Frontier Research Engineer Security, Chem-Bio engineering leads, Red Team EoI). Discovered via parallel ATS probe sweep.
14 roles at check time incl. Senior AI Governance Researcher (direct policy signal) and AI Security & Control Engineer. Discovered via parallel ATS probe sweep.
Westminster-based govtech consultancy. 1 role at check time (Bid Associate). Discovered via parallel ATS probe sweep.

_unmapped._note: Seeded companies WITHOUT a confirmed ATS JSON endpoint as of 2026-06-24. Most are think tanks / regulators / consultancies whose careers pages are bespoke HTML (no clean API). Candidates for a future careful-HTML-read or manual check. Do NOT fabricate roles for these.
_unmapped._probe_2026_07_02: Parallel ATS probe sweep across the unmapped 58 orgs (up to 3 slug variants × greenhouse/lever/ashby). Genuine hits: aisi, apollo-research, public-io (added above). Rejected namespace collisions: cma-dmu→greenhouse/cma (Florida accounting firm), foxglove→ashby/foxglove (SF robotics observability co, not UK Foxglove Legal charity), oliver-wyman-london→lever/oliverwyman (2 generic roles = squatted account, not real Oliver Wyman). Also caught existing slug bug: cohere→cohere-london, faculty→faculty-ai (feed filenames didn't match mapping keys, silently broken since 2026-06-24). Remaining 55 unmapped orgs = confirmed no public ATS on greenhouse/lever/ashby; need bespoke-HTML or browser-tool tier.
